mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_tail_trade_snapshot ( stock_code, trade_date, price_1400, price_1430, high_before_1430, low_before_1430, tail_amount_1400_1430, tail_volume_1400_1430, amount_before_1430, volume_before_1430, sell_amount_0930_0945, sell_volume_0930_0945, sell_vwap_0930_0945, valid_flag, invalid_reason, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.stockCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.price1400}, #{item.price1430}, #{item.highBefore1430}, #{item.lowBefore1430}, #{item.tailAmount14001430}, #{item.tailVolume14001430}, #{item.amountBefore1430}, #{item.volumeBefore1430}, #{item.sellAmount09300945}, #{item.sellVolume09300945}, #{item.sellVwap09300945}, #{item.validFlag}, #{item.invalidReason}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE price_1400 = VALUES(price_1400), price_1430 = VALUES(price_1430), high_before_1430 = VALUES(high_before_1430), low_before_1430 = VALUES(low_before_1430), tail_amount_1400_1430 = VALUES(tail_amount_1400_1430), tail_volume_1400_1430 = VALUES(tail_volume_1400_1430), amount_before_1430 = VALUES(amount_before_1430), volume_before_1430 = VALUES(volume_before_1430), sell_amount_0930_0945 = VALUES(sell_amount_0930_0945), sell_volume_0930_0945 = VALUES(sell_volume_0930_0945), sell_vwap_0930_0945 = VALUES(sell_vwap_0930_0945), valid_flag = VALUES(valid_flag), invalid_reason = VALUES(invalid_reason), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
